form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for the 111th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the following committees for the remainder of the 111th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on agriculture, nutrition, and forestry:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Chambliss, Mr. Lugar, Mr. Cochran, Mr. McConnell, Mr. Roberts, Mr. Johanns, Mr. Grassley, Mr. Thune, and Mr. Cornyn.
Mr. Lugar, Mr. Corker, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Risch, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Wicker, and Mr. Inhofe.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on homeland security and governmental affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Collins, Mr. Coburn, Mr. McCain, Mr. Voinovich, Mr. Ensign, Mr. Graham, and Mr. Bennett.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on small business and entrepreneurship:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Snowe, Mr. Bond, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Thune, Mr. Enzi, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Wicker, and Mr. Risch.
Mr. Martinez, Mr. Shelby, Ms. Collins, Mr. Corker, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Brownback, Mr. Graham, and Mr. Chambliss.
